name: Feature request
about: Request a new capability, workflow, platform improvement, or renderer tool.

<!--
Use this for new functionality that is not primarily about matching existing Unity renderer behavior.
For Unity behavior gaps, use the Unity parity template.
-->

**Problem**
<!-- What problem should this solve, and who benefits from it? -->


**Proposed solution**
<!-- Describe the capability, workflow, API, diagnostic, or user-visible behavior you want. -->


**Alternatives**
<!-- If you have considered other approaches or workarounds, describe them here. -->


**Extra materials**
<!-- Links, screenshots, captures, papers, standards, related issues, or renderer examples can go here. -->
